title: Rethoughted GUI
body:
![Visualizing changes in textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d4f9d1b06c8a2b881ec3005afc7b7f3068a55fe_0.webp) ### 🖥️ About changes: #### This resource pack overhauls the user interface, giving it a fresh, simple, and modern Minecraft style while staying true to the vanilla aesthetic. #### There is also [respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) configuration, read more lower. - - - ### 🖼️ Gallery: #### Go to the [gallery section](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rethoughted-gui/gallery), lol #### (screenshot are сurrent for v1.0 and mostly for v1.2) - - - ### ⚙️ Configuration: #### From **v1.1 and above** you can configure this pack via [respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) menu. This means you also need to have the mod installed for your configuration to work! #### At the moment, you can customize various parts of the HUD (such as hearts, experience bar, crosshair, etc.), the title screen, parts of the GUI, and more:

#### More customization options will be available in future updates - - - ### 🧩 Compatibility: #### [Rethoughted GUI Compatible Collection](https://modrinth.com/collection/FRsfdqNp)

#### You can suggest mods and resource packs for future compatibility on my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/q29y59SWEu). - - - ### 💡 Recommended mods: #### Some mods that will make the GUI even better:
| [![](https://i.imgur.com/zdf7hi2.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/blur-plus) | **[Blur+](https://modrinth.com/mod/blur-plus)** | |-|-| | [![](https://i.imgur.com/hO6VXg0.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-hotbar) | **[Immersive Hotbar](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-hotbar)** | |-|-| | [![](https://i.imgur.com/9Thx72p.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-gui) | **[Smooth GUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-gui)** | |-|-| | [![](https://i.imgur.com/6hxMClv.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-scroll) | **[Smooth Scroll](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-scroll)** | |-|-|
- - - ### 🔽 Instalation:
Windows Extract files from .zip by path:
>C:\\Users\\(Your Username)\\AppData\\Roaming\\.minecraft\\resourcepacks
Linux Extract files from .zip by path:
>~/.minecraft\\resourcepacks
MacOS Extract files from .zip by path:
>~/Library/Application Support/minecraft\\resourcepacks
--- ### 📄 Credits: #### Textures created by CatFromNet (me) #### Inspired by the new Minecraft Bedrock interface #### Some elements were inspired by [Mandala's GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mandalas-gui-dark-mode) --- ### 📜 License & Distribution #### By downloading or using this resource pack, you agree to the terms of the CC BY-NC 4.0 license.
You are allowed to: - download, use and share this resource pack - include it on your server or in your modpack - modify the files for non-commercial purposes - publish modified versions with proper credit to the original author
You are not allowed to: - sell or monetize the original files in any form - upload paywalled downloads or ad-locked links using the original pack - claim authorship of the original textures or models - use this resource pack, or any unmodified part of it, for commercial projects
#### Commercial use of modified versions is also not permitted unless you have received explicit permission from the author. --- ### 🔎You may also like:
